query:
SELECT fs.id, fs.code, fs.name, fs.displayOrder, fs.isRepeatable
FROM formSections fs
JOIN requestTypes rt ON fs.requestTypeId = rt.id
WHERE rt.code = 'ADMIN_VISIT'
ORDER BY fs.displayOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT fs.id, fs.code, fs.name, fs.displayOrder, fs.isRepeatable
FROM formSections fs
JOIN requestTypes rt ON fs.requestTypeId = rt.id
WHERE rt.code = 'ADMIN_VISIT'
ORDER BY fs.displayOrder;
